policy: Keep tasks small enough for one Codex patch. Split ambiguous tasks before implementation.

current.title: Implement multi-ring or halo preset
current.goal: Add one layered ring or halo preset without obscuring the transparent box.
constraints: Implement only multi-ring or halo
Keep layers readable and particle counts capped
Do not modify standalone main.py
Do not copy external Firework.py code
acceptance: Multiple layers are readable without crushing frame pacing or box readability
Trail density is controlled and partial
Same seed gives same particle initial states
Existing presets still work
Validation results are recorded

current.title: Implement senrin / secondary burst preset
current.goal: Add one small-shell cluster or secondary-burst preset with restrained secondary trails.
constraints: Implement only senrin or secondary burst behavior
Keep secondary particles capped
Do not modify standalone main.py
Do not copy external Firework.py code
acceptance: Secondary burst timing is deterministic
Secondary particle count is bounded
Secondary trails are restrained
Existing presets still work
Validation results are recorded

current.title: Add preset cycling and visual tuning checklist
current.goal: Add a minimal way to cycle available presets and document visual tuning checks.
constraints: Do not add scoring, objectives, characters, maps, or unrelated gameplay
Do not rewrite renderer or camera architecture
Do not modify standalone main.py unless explicitly approved
Keep controls and checklist minimal
acceptance: Available presets can be selected or cycled without breaking existing controls
Visual tuning checklist covers trails, box readability, frame pacing, and depth ordering
No unrelated gameplay features were added
Validation results are recorded

current.title: Recreate protected prototype viewpoint controls in package
current.goal: Add package-side viewpoint/camera adjustment matching the protected main.py prototype behavior.
constraints: Use T0002.5 migration notes as the source of truth
Do not invent unrelated camera behavior
Preserve the 256x144 transparent box viewing feel
Keep Pyxel input handling at the app/input boundary
acceptance: Relevant docs and T0002.5 migration notes were read
Package-side controls match the protected prototype intent
No unrelated gameplay or preset work was added
Tests or checklist were updated when relevant
Assumptions and risks were reported

current.title: Add trail tuning checklist
acceptance: Relevant docs were read
Patch is small and coherent
Tests or checklist were updated when relevant
Assumptions and risks were reported

current.title: Add scenery preset data scaffold
current.goal: Add data-only scaffolding for future selectable in-box scenery presets.
constraints: Data scaffold only
Do not add full scenery rendering yet
Do not use screen-space backgrounds
Use y-up 3D box coordinates
Keep Pyxel calls outside scenery model definitions
acceptance: SceneKind or equivalent enum exists
SceneryPreset or equivalent data type exists
Vec3, Line3D, and Polyline3D or equivalents are available
EMPTY preset exists
No visible behavior changes unless explicitly intended
Tests or compile checks are updated where practical

current.title: Add EMPTY and MOUNTAINS scenery presets
current.goal: Add the first scenery presets as quiet 3D line data inside the observation box.
constraints: Implement only EMPTY and MOUNTAINS
Use box-relative y-up 3D coordinates
Keep mountain geometry low-detail and dark
Do not use screen-space background drawing
acceptance: EMPTY preset remains visually empty
MOUNTAINS preset uses sparse rear-side 3D polyline data
Scenery stays quieter than fireworks
No unrelated firework preset work is added

current.title: Add CITY skyline scenery preset
current.goal: Add a quiet city skyline scenery preset using coarse 3D line segments.
constraints: Implement only CITY
Use coarse vertical and horizontal line segments
Do not add filled polygons
Do not use screen-space background drawing
acceptance: CITY preset is readable as a sparse skyline
Line density does not compete with fireworks
Scenery uses the shared 3D projection pipeline
No unrelated gameplay work is added

current.title: Add FOREST scenery preset
current.goal: Add a quiet forest scenery preset using simple trunks and sparse branch lines.
constraints: Implement only FOREST
Use simple trunks and sparse branch lines
Keep colors dark and low contrast
Do not use screen-space background drawing
acceptance: FOREST preset is readable without dense detail
Line count remains bounded
Scenery uses y-up 3D coordinates
No unrelated gameplay work is added

current.title: Add RIVERBANK scenery preset
current.goal: Add a quiet riverbank scenery preset using floor-plane polylines near the bottom of the box.
constraints: Implement only RIVERBANK
Use bottom-of-box floor-plane polylines
Do not implement reflections yet
Do not use screen-space background drawing
acceptance: RIVERBANK preset reads as low, quiet structure near the bottom of the box
No water reflection behavior is implemented
Scenery uses the shared 3D projection pipeline
No unrelated gameplay work is added

current.title: Add scenery preset cycling UI
current.goal: Add a minimal way to cycle available scenery presets without changing firework preset behavior.
constraints: Keep scenery selection minimal
Do not change firework preset cycling behavior
Do not add scoring, objectives, characters, or maps
Preserve current camera and observation feel
acceptance: Available scenery presets can be cycled or selected
UI remains unobtrusive
Firework controls remain intact
Validation results are recorded

done.title: Initialize docs from project brief
done.summary: Created project_brief.json from the template example and generated the initial product docs, goal state, roadmap, and task queue.

done.title: Review external firework reference files
done.summary: Reviewed the external Firework.py as reference material only and documented adaptable burst ideas, coordinate risks, trail risks, and suggested preset candidates in docs/research/external_firework_reference.md.

done.title: Verify package imports and tests
done.summary: Set up local validation tools and verified package import, compile, pytest, ruff, uv, and check_all status. pyxel, pytest, ruff, and uv are installed; compileall, pytest, ruff, and check_all pass.

done.title: Document screen profiles and in-box scenery architecture
done.summary: Completed as a documentation-only planning task. Added screen profile strategy, in-box 3D scenery architecture, future task ordering, and the requirement that scenery must not be a 2D screen-space background.

done.title: Reconcile standalone prototype with package architecture
done.summary: Inspected protected standalone main.py, documented its Camera3D, box, rocket, particle, trail, render, and UI behavior, and mapped a staged package migration strategy in docs/architecture/PROTOTYPE_RECONCILIATION.md.

done.title: Add screen profile configuration scaffold
done.summary: Added package-side ScreenProfile configuration data with classic as the default profile and iphone16_balanced and iphone16_large as selectable data.

done.title: Add package-side Camera3D and projection scaffold
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent Camera3D projection scaffold using ScreenProfile values and tests for y-up projection, profile-dependent centers, depth guard, determinism, and smoothing.

done.title: Add package-side wire box scaffold
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent WireBox geometry scaffold using ScreenProfile box dimensions and Camera3D projection, with tests for dimensions, vertices, edges, centering, edge groups, and deterministic projected edges.

done.title: Establish firework preset scaffold
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent firework preset scaffold with FireworkKind, FireworkShape, TrailPreset, SecondaryPreset, and FireworkPreset data types.

done.title: Implement deterministic radial / kiku preset
done.summary: Added KIKU_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent spherical burst generation that returns ParticleSpawnSpec values with partial trail data.

done.title: Implement ring preset
done.summary: Added RING_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent ring burst generation with mostly planar velocities, small z thickness, and partial trail data.

done.title: Add manual Pyxel preview for Kiku and Ring bursts
done.summary: Added a manual tools/preview_firework_box.py Pyxel preview harness for visually inspecting package-side Camera3D, WireBox, Kiku, and Ring burst behavior before Spiral work.

done.title: Tune iPhone screen profiles to portrait firework volume
done.summary: Adjusted iPhone-style profiles so the internal observation box becomes a tall portrait firework volume.

done.title: Tune iPhone screen profiles to portrait Pyxel viewport
done.summary: Changed iPhone-style Pyxel screen profiles from landscape to portrait while preserving the tall firework volume and classic default.

done.title: Add deterministic Ring orientation bank
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent RingOrientation and RingOrientationBank support with stratified deterministic orientations, and connected the manual preview to use a 24-orientation bank for Ring bursts.

done.title: Implement spiral preset
done.summary: Added SPIRAL_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent 3D spiral burst generation, and extended the manual preview to cycle Kiku, Ring, and Spiral.

done.title: Implement willow preset
done.summary: Added WILLOW_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent willow burst generation with stronger negative gravity, longer partial trails, and manual preview cycling.

done.title: Implement peony preset
done.summary: Added PEONY_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent peony burst generation with short life, bright palette, restrained trails, and manual preview cycling.

done.title: Add random burst selection mode to preview
done.summary: Added preview-only random burst selection mode with R to enter random mode, SPACE to return to sequential mode, and deterministic random choices for manual and auto launches.

done.title: Add fixed-position salvo launch plans to preview
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent fixed-position salvo plans and preview number-key scheduling for 1 through 5 profile-scaled burst launches.
